features: RESTORES EXISTING REPELLENCY – this easy-to-use cleaner, removes dirt to restore any existing repellency
MAXIMISES BREATHABILITY – As well as powerful cleaning, it maximises breathability, offering comfort and protection
NEUTRAL SMELL – All of Grangers’ products have a neutral smell and add no optical brighteners
HARD or SOFT WATER – Performance Wash performs the same in hard or soft water, so you only need 25ml per washload
CONCENTRATED FORMULATION – With this new concentrated version you get more powerful cleaning and twice as many washes per bottle

ECO-RESPONSIBLE – Grangers’ products are eco-friendly and made with the environment in mind. The water-based PFC-free (fluorocarbon free) formulations and keep you warm and dry, while protecting the world we all love to explore
BLUESIGN APPROVED – Performance Wash is bluesign approved, which guarantees you environmentally-responsible protection for all your outdoor clothing
description: Product Description Restore your gear with the high-performance cleaner for all technical garments. Washing technical fabrics with household detergents can leave behind chemical residues which impair performance and may reduce the lifetime of your garments. The solution? Grangers Performance Wash. A smart, versatile and effective cleaner, performance wash simply replaces your existing laundry detergents. It removes dirt, dust, and grime efficiently, at low wash temperatures and in a single wash cycle. And, it leaves no scent or optical brighteners behind, making it the perfect base wash for future waterproofing treatments. Formulated to restore your garments breathability, and designed to preserve any existing water-repellency, Performance wash is safe to use on all technical fabrics, sportswear, and performance clothing, including those with Gore-Tex and eVent membranes.
